sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_hashes (id INTEGER, original_value VARCHAR, hashed_value VARCHAR);
INSERT INTO test_hashes (id, original_value, hashed_value) VALUES (1, 'sample_text', sha256('sample_text'));
UPDATE test_hashes SET hashed_value = sha256(original_value) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, original_value, hashed_value FROM test_hashes WHERE hashed_value = sha256('sample_text');
